full_text:
Gongsun Zan (Bogui) 公孫瓚 (伯珪)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gongsun Zan (公孫瓚), styledBogui (伯珪), was born in Liaoxi. Magistrate of Beiping. Fought Yuan Shao. Committed suicide with his family. Gongsun Zan was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Gongsun Zan lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
